name: L-4 extract-patterns reports patterns count on stderr after writing the output file per the L-4 progress signal
command: printf '%s' '{"number":7,"comments":[{"body":"please add null check before dereferencing"},{"body":"prefer Map over object for unbounded key sets"}]}' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/extract-patterns.sh" --pr pr.json --out patterns.json 2>err.txt && grep -q 'pr=7' err.txt && grep -q 'patterns=2' err.txt && echo counted 1>&2
